# Hegazy Group

> Specialist distributor of aluminum profiles, sheets, plates, coils, foils, bars, and rods — sourced from qualified mills and delivered on schedule to construction, manufacturing, marine, and automotive buyers.

Hegazy Group is a business-to-business aluminum supply and distribution company. We do not manufacture; we source finished aluminum products from qualified mills and deliver them against customer specifications. Requests for quotation, product data sheets, and technical specifications are handled through the pages below.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Hegazy Group's aluminum supply and distribution offer.
- [About](/about): Company profile, sourcing approach, and distribution footprint.
- [Products](/products): Full catalog of stocked and on-request aluminum products.
- [Industries](/industries): Sectors served — construction, manufacturing, marine, automotive.
- [Projects](/projects): Sample structure for reference case studies.
- [Resources](/resources): Technical guides, specification references, and buyer documentation.
- [Locations](/locations): Warehouse and distribution locations.
- [Contact](/contact): Sales and technical contact channels.
- [Request a Quote](/quote): Structured RFQ intake for aluminum orders.

## Product categories

- [Profiles](/products/profiles): Extruded and architectural aluminum profiles.
- [Sheets & Plates](/products/sheets-plates): Mill, marine, and pre-coated aluminum sheet and plate.
- [Bars & Rods](/products/bars-rods): Round, square, and hex aluminum bar and rod stock.
- [Coils & Foils](/products/coils-foils): Converter, household, and pre-painted aluminum coil and foil.

## Industries

- [Construction](/industries/construction): Aluminum supply for building envelopes and fit-out.
- [Manufacturing](/industries/manufacturing): Aluminum inputs for OEM and fabrication.
- [Marine](/industries/marine): Marine-grade aluminum for hulls and superstructure.
- [Automotive](/industries/automotive): Aluminum stock for automotive components.

## Resources

- [Specifications](/resources/specs): Alloy, temper, and finish reference sheets.
- [Guides](/resources/guides): Procurement and application guidance.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions on lead times, documentation, and sourcing.
